zh.Ashe, Musbury, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭戴文姆斯波利
zh.Otterton, Devon, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭戴文奧特頓

zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian Billett於大約1354年出生在英國英格蘭戴文奧特頓時，她的父親John BILLETT31歲，母親Alice HAMPTON28歲。她於1374年與John Drake在英國英格蘭戴文奧特頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1430年在英國英格蘭戴文姆斯波利享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christian Billett于大约1354年出生在英国英格兰戴文奧特頓时，她的父亲John BILLETT31岁，母亲Alice HAMPTON28岁。她于1374年与John Drake在英国英格兰戴文奧特頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1430年在英国英格兰戴文姆斯波利享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Billett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possibly also an altered form of French Billet , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

variants.name: Billet
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hadassa, Herschel, Mendel, Mertie.
French: from a shortened form of Robillet, itself a pet form of Robert .
French: from a diminutive of Old French bille ‘block, piece of tree trunk; stick’ (see Bille ).

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian Billett was born about 1354, in Otterton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, John BILLETT, was 31 and her mother, Alice HAMPTON, was 28. She married John Drake in 1374, in Otterton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1430, in Musbury, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian Billett est née environ 1354, à Otterton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John BILLETT, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alice HAMPTON, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé John Drake en 1374, à Otterton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1430, à Musbury, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christian Billett um 1354 in Otterton, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John BILLETT 31 und ihre Mutter Alice HAMPTON 28. Sie hat 1374 in Otterton, Devon, England, United Kingdom John Drake geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1430 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Musbury, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Billett è nata il circa 1354 nel Otterton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John BILLETT, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Alice HAMPTON, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato John Drake nel 1374, nel Otterton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1430, nel Musbury, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christian Billettが約1354年にイギリスイギリスデボンオッテルトンで生まれた時，父John BILLETTは31歳，母Alice HAMPTONは28歳であった。1374年にイギリスイギリスデボンオッテルトンでJohn Drakeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1430年にイギリスイギリスデボンムスブリーで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian Billett(이)가 대략 1354년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 오터턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John BILLETT(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice HAMPTON(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1374년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 오터턴에서 John Drake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 무스버이에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Billett nasceu aproximadamente 1354, em Otterton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John BILLETT, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alice HAMPTON, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com John Drake em 1374, em Otterton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1430, em Musbury, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian Billett родилась около 1354 г. в местности оттиртон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John BILLETT было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alice HAMPTON, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Drake в 1374 г. в местности оттиртон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1430 г. в местности мусбури, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christian Billett nació aproximadamente 1354, en Otterton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John BILLETT, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Alice HAMPTON, tenía 28 años. Se casó con John Drake en 1374, en Otterton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1430, en Musbury, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años.
